justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted 'tomorrow' and offered available slots for the next day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively presented available options when the user requested an appointment for 'tomorrow' and successfully booked the user's preferred slot.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just two turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth, professional, and directly led to a successful booking, providing an excellent customer experience.
